calendar.matters:
Petition To Find Assets Titled In The Name Of Mary S. Estamo Are Property Of Trust Under Probate Code Sections 17200(B)(4), 850(A)(3), 856
Off Calendar May-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maureen McFadden for (Petitioner) Lilian Estamo.

Ms. McFadden addressed the Probate Examiners notes stating that in regards to the personal papers in the safe deposit box and the savings bonds for the children the only alternative will be to file a petition for probate if an order cannot be issued, that in regards to the Chevron stock the petitioner believed it to be part of computer share but is not positive, and that with the Chase account and the life insurance they can obtain it through a Small Estate Affidavit if an order cannot be issued. The petition to find assets titled in the name of Mary S. Estamo are property of trust was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
